All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Abs
The node for calculating the absolute value of a number.
AbstractAggregateObjectiveComparator
Abstract class for implementing comparators based on some weighted aggregate of objective values.
AbstractAlgorithm
Abstract class providing default implementations for several Algorithm methods.
AbstractCompoundVariation<T extends Variation>
Constructs a variation operator applying two or more variations sequentially.
AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm
Abstract class providing default implementations for several EvolutionaryAlgorithm methods.
AbstractFactory<T>
Abstract factory for service providers.
AbstractProblem
Abstract class for a Problem.
AbstractPSOAlgorithm
Abstract multi-objective particle swarm optimizer (MOPSO).
AbstractSimulatedAnnealingAlgorithm
Abstract class of fundamental simulated annealing algorithm.
Ackley
The single-objective Ackley problem with an optimum at x = (0, 0) with f(x) = 0.
Acos
The node for calculating the arc cosine of a number.
Acosh
The node for calculating the hyperbolic arc cosine of a number.
ActionFactory
Collection of actions used by the diagnostic tool.
AdaptiveGridArchive
Adaptive grid archive.
AdaptiveMetropolis
The adaptive metropolis (AM) operator.
AdaptiveMultimethodVariation
Auto-adaptive multi-method recombination operator.
AdaptiveMultimethodVariationCollector
Collects the individual operator probabilities from AdaptiveMultimethodVariation.
AdaptiveTimeContinuation
Deprecated.
Use AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension instead
AdaptiveTimeContinuationCollector
Deprecated.
Use AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtensionCollector instead
AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension
Decorator for EvolutionaryAlgorithms to add time continuation (restarts).
AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtensionCollector
Collects the number of restart events resulting from AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension.
Add
Add mutation operator.
Add
The node for adding two numbers.
AdditiveEpsilonIndicator
Additive ε-indicator for minimization problems.
AdditiveEpsilonIndicatorFitnessEvaluator
Indicator-based fitness using the additive ε-indicator.
AGEMOEAII
Implementation of AGE-MOEA-II, which is an adaptive evolutionary algorithm that estimates the Pareto front geometry and uses this to score solutions during selection.
AggregateConstraintComparator
Compares solutions based on their magnitude of constraint violations.
AggregateObjectiveComparator
Compares solutions based on a computed aggregate fitness from the objective values.
Algorithm
Interface for an optimization algorithm.
AlgorithmException
An exception that originated from an algorithm.
AlgorithmFactory
Factory for creating algorithm instances.
AlgorithmInitializationException
An exception that originated from an algorithm during initialization.
AlgorithmProvider
Defines an SPI for algorithms.
AlgorithmTerminationException
An exception that originated from an algorithm during termination.
AlgorithmWrapper<T extends Algorithm>
Wrapper for an algorithm.
AMOSA
Implementation of the simulated annealing-based multiobjective optimization algorithm (AMOSA).
Analysis
Command line utility for calculating the best, probability of attainment, efficiency and controllability metrics.
AnalyticalProblem
Interface for problems whose Pareto optimal set is known analytically, providing the AnalyticalProblem.generate() method for producing randomly-generated reference sets.
Analyzer
Performs basic end-of-run analysis.
And
The node for calculating the logical AND of two boolean values.
ApproximationSetCollector
Collects approximation sets from an Algorithm.
ApproximationSetPlot
Displays the end-of-run Pareto approximation set.
ApproximationSetViewer
Window for displaying approximation set dynamics.
ARFFConverter
Converts a result file into an ARFF file that can be loaded into various data mining software (e.g., Weka).
Asin
The node for calculating the arc sine of a number.
Asinh
The node for calculating the hyperbolic arc sine of a number.
Atan
The node for calculating the arc tangent of a number.
Atanh
The node for calculating the hyperbolic arc tangent of a number.
AttachPoint
Identifies objects in an object graph (all public and private fields contained within an object and those it references).
AttractiveSector
The Attractive Sector function.
Attribute
Marker interface for accessing attributes.
BasicIslandExecutor
Executes an island model using an .
BBOB2016Problems
Problem provider for all problems in the BBOB 2016 test suite.
BBOBFunction
Abstract class for the functions provided by the BBOB test suite.
BBOBTransformation
Abstract class for transformations provided by the BBOB test suite.
Beale
The single-objective Beale problem with an optimum at x = (3.0, 0.5) with f(x) = 0.
Belegundu
The Belegundu problem.
BinaryIntegerVariable
Decision variable for integers encoded as a binary string.
BinaryVariable
Decision variable for binary strings.
Binh
The Binh problem.
Binh2
The Binh (2) problem.
Binh3
The Binh (3) problem.
Binh4
The Binh (4) problem.
BitFlip
Bit flip mutation operator.
BuildProblem
Command line tool for creating new natively-compiled problems.
C1_DTLZ1
The C1-DTLZ1 test problem.
C1_DTLZ3
The C1-DTLZ3 test problem.
C2_DTLZ2
The C2-DTLZ2 test problem.
C3_DTLZ1
The C3-DTLZ1 test problem.
C3_DTLZ4
The C3-DTLZ4 test problem.
CachedDistanceMeasure<T>
Wraps a DistanceMeasure to cache or memoize the calculations in memory.
Call
The node for calling a named function.
CallbackExtension
Extension that invokes a callback function every iteration.
CDTLZProblemProvider
Problem provider for the constrained DTLZ test problems.
CEC2009ProblemProvider
Constructs and configures the CEC2009 problems.
Ceil
The node for calculating the smallest integer value that is greater than or equal to a number.
CF1
The constrained CF1 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
CF10
The constrained CF10 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
CF2
The constrained CF2 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
CF3
The constrained CF3 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
CF4
The constrained CF4 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
CF5
The constrained CF5 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
CF6
The constrained CF6 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
CF7
The constrained CF7 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
CF8
The constrained CF8 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
CF9
The constrained CF9 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
ChainedComparator
Applies any number of comparators in succession, returning the result from the first comparator producing a non-zero return value.
CheckpointExtension
Adds checkpoint functionality to an algorithm where the state is periodically recorded in a state file.
Checkpoints
Deprecated.
Use CheckpointExtension instead
ClassLoaderProblems
Legacy problem provider that locates problems using their fully-qualified class name.
Cluster
Defines a cluster of solutions along with the distance measure used to form the cluster.
ClusterableSolution
Clusterable wrapper for a Solution that associates the point used for clustering with each solution.
Clustering
Interface for a clustering algorithm.
CMAES
The Covariance Matrix Adaption Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES) algorithm for single and multi-objective problems.
Collector
Collects information from an object.
Column<T,V>
Defines a column in a TabularData instance.
CommandLineUtility
Abstract class for providing command line utilities.
CommentedLineReader
Read text from a character-input stream, ignoring lines starting with the # character.
CompoundMutation
Versions of CompoundVariation that only supports mutation operators.
CompoundTerminationCondition
Terminates a run when one or more termination conditions are satisfied.
CompoundVariation
Construct a variation operator applying one or more variations sequentially.
Concaterator<T>
An iterator that produces the concatenation of multiple iterators.
Configurable
Interface for classes that can be configured either explicitly by overriding the methods defined by this interface or auto-configurable by using the annotations available in this package.
ConfigurationException
Indicates an error occurred when configuring an object or reading properties.
ConfigurationUtils
Utility methods for scanning classes to identify properties, reading the configured values, or setting new values.
Constant
The node for defining a constant value.
Constraint
Useful methods for calculating constraints.
ContextFreeGrammar
A context-free grammar.
Contribution
Measures the contribution of the approximation set to the reference set.
Controller
The controller manages the underlying data model, performs the evaluation of jobs, and notifies any listeners when its state changes.
Controller.Setting<T>
Represents a setting that can be configured programmatically or through user interaction in the UI.
ControllerEvent
Identifies the type of event fired by the controller.
ControllerEvent.Type
Enumeration of controller event types.
ControllerListener
Listens for events fired by the controller.
ConvexC2_DTLZ2
The convex C2-DTLZ2 problem.
ConvexDTLZ2
The convex DTLZ2 problem.
CoolingSchedule
Defines a cooling schedule for simulated annealing algorithms.
CorrelationMatrix
Correlation matrices used by the LSMOP test problem suite.
Cos
The node for calculating the trigonometric cosine of an angle specified in radians.
Cosh
The node for calculating the hyperbolic cosine of a number.
CrowdingComparator
Compares solutions using their crowding distance.
CrowdingDistance
Crowding distance attribute.
CrowdingDistanceFitnessEvaluator
Assigns fitness values based on the crowding distance from fast non-dominated sorting.
DBEA
Implementation of the Improved Decomposition-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (I-DBEA).
DefaultAlgorithms
A provider of default algorithms.
DefaultEpsilons
Provides ε values for algorithms and archives using ε-dominance.
DefaultNormalizer
Class for constructing normalizers, allowing users to override defaults for specific problems.
DefaultOperators
Default provider of operators.
Define
The node for defining a callable, named function.
DiagnosticTool
The main window of the diagnostic tool.
DifferentialEvolution
Single-objective differential evolution (DE) algorithm.
DifferentialEvolutionSelection
Selection operator to be used in conjunction with the DifferentialEvolutionVariation operator.
DifferentialEvolutionVariation
Differential evolution (DE) variation operator.
DifferentPowers
The Different Powers function.
Displayable
Interface used by classes that display content, either to standard output or an output stream.
DistanceMeasure<T>
Interface for computing the distance between two objects.
DistanceMeasure.ApacheDistanceMeasure<T extends org.apache.commons.math3.ml.clustering.Clusterable>
Wraps one of the Apache Commons Math distance measures to be compatible with our generic distance measure.
DistributedProblem
Distributes the DistributedProblem.evaluate(Solution) method across multiple threads, cores or compute nodes using the provided ExecutorService.
DistributedProblem
Deprecated.
Moved to DistributedProblem
Divide
The node for dividing two numbers.
DominanceComparator
Interface for comparing two solutions using a dominance relation.
DoubleValidator
Validator for double primitives.
DTLZ
Implements methods shared by all problems in the DTLZ test suite.
DTLZ1
The DTLZ1 test problem.
DTLZ2
The DTLZ2 test problem.
DTLZ3
The DTLZ3 test problem.
DTLZ4
The DTLZ4 test problem.
DTLZ5
The DTLZ5 test problem.
DTLZ6
The DTLZ6 test problem.
DTLZ7
The DTLZ7 test problem.
DTLZProblemProvider
Problem provider for the DTLZ test problems.
DurationUtils
Utility for converting a Duration into primitives.
ElapsedTimeCollector
Collects the elapsed execution time of an algorithm.
Ellipsoid
The Ellipsoid function.
EmptyPlot
Placeholder in a layout for unoccupied grid locations.
EncodingUtils
Helper methods for working with various decision variable types and encodings.
Environment
The execution context, or environment, storing the named variables used by a program.
EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive
A non-dominated population using an ε-box dominance comparator.
EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator
Compares two solutions using aggregate constraint violations and the additive ε-box objective comparator.
EpsilonBoxEvolutionaryAlgorithm
Interface for evolutionary algorithms using an ε-box dominance archive.
EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator
Compares two solutions using the additive ε-box objective comparator.
EpsilonMOEA
Implementation of the ε-MOEA algorithm.
EpsilonNSGAII
Implements the ε-NSGA-II algorithm.
EpsilonProgressCollector
Collects the number of ε-progress improvements detected in an EpsilonBoxEvolutionaryAlgorithm.
EpsilonProgressContinuation
Deprecated.
Use EpsilonProgressContinuationExtension instead
EpsilonProgressContinuationExtension
Extends AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension to trigger restarts using ε-progress.
Epsilons
Stores the ε values for an ε-dominance archive.
Equals
The node for comparing two numbers for equality.
Evaluator
Command line utility for evaluating an algorithm using many parameterizations.
EvolutionaryAlgorithm
Interface for an evolutionary algorithm.
EvolutionStrategy
Single-objective (mu + lambda) evolution strategy (ES) algorithm.
Executor
Configures and executes algorithms while hiding the underlying boilerplate code needed to setup and safely execute an algorithm.
Exp
The node for calculating the result of Euler's number e raised to the power of a number.
Extensible
Interface for algorithms that support extensibility.
Extension
Extensions are a flexible alternative to wrappers when extending or augmenting the functionality of an algorithm.
Extensions
A collection of Extension associated with an Algorithm.
ExternalProblem
Evaluate solutions using an externally-defined problem.
ExternalProblem.Builder
Builder for defining the process or connection to the external problem.
ExternalProblem.Instance
Instance of the external problem.
ExtractData
Command line utility for extracting data from a result file.
FastNondominatedSorting
Fast non-dominated sorting algorithm for dominance depth ranking.
FeasibilityRatio
Computes the feasibility ratio of a given problem, which takes a random sampling of solutions and computes the percentage that are feasible.
Fitness
Fitness value attribute, typically computed by a fitness function.
FitnessBasedArchive
Maintains a non-dominated archive of solutions with a maximum capacity.
FitnessComparator
Compares two solutions based on their fitness value.
FitnessEvaluator
Evaluates a population and assigns fitness values to its solutions.
Floor
The node for calculating the largest integer value that is less than or equal to a number.
Fonseca
The Fonseca problem.
Fonseca2
The Fonseca (2) problem.
For
The node for executing an expression for a given number of iterations.
Formattable<T>
Interface used by classes containing tabular data (think like a spreadsheet) that can be formatted and rendered in various ways.
Formatter<T>
Formats an object of some type into a string.
FrameworkException
The framework exception is the parent type of all exceptions specific to the MOEA Framework.
FrequencyType
Defines the type of frequency.
FullyConnectedTopology
A fully-connected or "star" topology where each island is connected to every other island.
FutureSolution
Represents a Solution evaluated asynchronously.
Gallagher
The 101-peak Gallagher function.
GDE3
Implementation of the Generalized Differential Evolution (GDE3) algorithm.
GenerationalDistance
Generational distance (GD) indicator.
GenerationalDistancePlus
Generational distance plus (GD+) indicator.
GeneticAlgorithm
Single-objective genetic algorithm (GA) implementation with elitism.
GeometricCoolingSchedule
Geometric reduction rule for simulated annealing.
Get
The node for reading the value stored in a named variable within the current scope.
Grammar
Decision variable for grammars.
GrammarCrossover
Single-point crossover for grammars.
GrammarException
Exception indicating an error while parsing or processing grammars.
GrammarMutation
Uniform mutation for grammars.
GreaterThan
The node for comparing if one number is greater than another.
GreaterThanOrEqual
The node for comparing if a number is greater than or equal to another.
Griewank
The single-objective Griewank problem with an optimum at x = (0, ..., 0) with f(x) = 0.
Himmelblau
The single-objective Himmelblau's function with four local minima, all with f(x) = 0.
HUX
Half-uniform crossover (HUX) operator.
Hypervolume
Hypervolume indicator.
HypervolumeContributionFitnessEvaluator
Assigns the fitness of solutions based on their contribution to the overall hypervolume.
HypervolumeFitnessEvaluator
Indicator-based fitness using the hypervolume metric.
IBEA
Implementation of the Indicator-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (IBEA).
IfElse
The node for executing one of two expressions depending on the result of a boolean expression.
ImmigrationQueue
A queue for tracking migrating solutions that is (1) thread-safe, and (2) automatically creates copies of the solutions to avoid issues in shared-memory environments.
Indicator
Interface for a unary quality indicator.
IndicatorCollector
Collects performance indicator values from an Algorithm.
IndicatorFitnessEvaluator
Abstract class for assigning fitness based on a binary indicator.
Indicators
Helper for evaluating multiple performance indicators, primarily for avoiding repetitive calculations that would occur if creating each indicator separately.
Indicators.IndicatorValues
Collection of indicator results, with values defaulting to 0d/0d if not included.
IndirectAlgorithmProvider
Algorithm provider that avoids creating runtime dependencies on external libraries.
Initialization
Interface for an initialization routine.
InjectedInitialization
Initialization method that injects pre-defined solutions into the initial population.
Insertion
Insertion mutation operator.
InstrumentedAlgorithm<T extends Algorithm>
Wraps an algorithm to indicate it is instrumented to collect runtime data.
InstrumentedExtension
Decorates an algorithm to periodically collect information about its runtime behavior.
Instrumenter
Instruments algorithms with Collectors which record information about the runtime behavior of algorithms.
IntegerValidator
Validator for int primitives.
IntervalRatioStatisticalTest
Abstract class for interval ratio statistical tests.
InvertedDTLZ1
The Inverted DTLZ1 test problem.
InvertedGenerationalDistance
Inverted generational distance (IGD) indicator.
InvertedGenerationalDistancePlus
Inverted generational distance plus (IGD+) indicator.
Island
Represents an island in an island model for parallelization.
IslandExecutor
Executes an island model strategy.
IslandModel
Describes the design of an island model parallelization strategy conceptually, including the islands, their topology, the migration schedule, etc.
Jimenez
The Jimenez problem.
JNAInfo
Command line tool used to lookup Java Native Access (JNA) information.
Kita
The Kita problem.
KMeansPlusPlusClustering
A wrapper for the Apache Commons Math K-means++ algorithm.
KruskalWallisTest
The Kruskal-Wallis One-Way Analysis of Variance by Ranks is a non-parametric statistical test determining if (at least) two out of K >= 2 populations have differing medians.
Kursawe
The Kursawe test problem.
Lambda
The node for defining an immutable, anonymous function.
LatinHypercube
Generates sequences using Latin hypercube sampling (LHS).
Laumanns
The Laumanns problem.
LaunchDiagnosticTool
Command line utility for launching the diagnostic tool.
LessThan
The node for comparing if a number is less than another.
LessThanOrEqual
The node for comparing if a number is less than or equal to another.
LexicographicalComparator
Compares solutions lexicographically.
LinearAlgebra
Collection of linear algebra routines.
LinearDominanceComparator
Version of the weighted linear aggregate function that supports constraints.
LinearObjectiveComparator
The weighted linear aggregate function.
LinePlot
Displays a line plot of the runtime dynamics of a metric, displaying the 25, 50, and 75-th quantiles.
LinkageFunction
Linkage functions used by the LSMOP test problem suite.
Lis
The Lis problem.
Localization
Facilitates internalization (i18n) and localization (l10n) of strings.
Log
The node for calculating the natural logarithm of a number.
Log10
The node for calculating the base-10 logarithm of a number.
LoggingExtension
Extension that logs information about the execution, including the current NFE and elapsed time.
LSMOP
Abstract class for defining LSMOP test problems.
LSMOP1
The unimodal, fully-separable LSMOP1 problem.
LSMOP2
The mixed-modality, partially-separable LSMOP2 problem.
LSMOP3
The multi-modal, mixed-separability LSMOP3 problem.
LSMOP4
The mixed-modality, mixed-separability LSMOP4 problem.
LSMOP5
The unimodal, fully-separable LSMOP5 problem.
LSMOP6
The mixed-modality, partially-separable LSMOP6 problem.
LSMOP7
The multi-modal, mixed-separability LSMOP7 problem.
LSMOP8
The mixed-modality, mixed-separability LSMOP8 problem.
LSMOP9
The mixed-modality, fully-separable LSMOP9 problem.
LSMOPProblemProvider
Problem provider for the LSMOP test problems.
LZ
Abstract class for implementing problems from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZ1
The F1 problem from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZ2
The F2 problem from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZ3
The F3 problem from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZ4
The F4 problem from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZ5
The F5 problem from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZ6
The F6 problem from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZ7
The F7 problem from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZ8
The F8 problem from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZ9
The F9 problem from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
LZProblemProvider
Problem provider for the LZ test problems.
MaF1
The MaF1 test problem, which is a modified inverted version of the DTLZ1 test problem.
MaF10
The MaF10 test problem, which is identical to the WFG1 test problem.
MaF11
The MaF11 test problem, which is identical to the WFG2 test problem.
MaF12
The MaF12 test problem, which is identical to the WFG9 test problem.
MaF13
The MaF13 test problem.
MaF14
The MaF14 test problem, which is identical to the LSMOP3 test problem with N_k=2 and N_ns=20.
MaF15
The MaF15 test problem, which is an inverted version of the LSMOP8 test problem with N_k=2 and N_ns=20..
MaF2
The MaF2 test problem, also known as the "DTLZ2BZ" problem.
MaF3
The MaF3 test problem, which is a convex version of the DTLZ3 problem.
MaF4
The MaF4 test problem, which is an inverted and badly scaled version of the DTLZ3 problem.
MaF5
The MaF5 test problem, which is a convex and badly scaled version of the DTLZ4 problem.
MaF6
The MaF6 test problem, also known as the "DTLZ5(I,M)" problem with I=2.
MaF7
The MaF7 test problem, which is identical to the DTLZ7 test problem.
MaF8
The MaF8 test problem.
MaF9
The MaF9 test problem.
MaFProblemProvider
Problem provider for the MaF test problems.
MannWhitneyUTest
The Mann-Whitney U test determines if two populations have different medians.
MatrixReader
Reader of files containing matrices.
Max
The node for calculating the maximum value of the two arguments.
MaxElapsedTime
Terminates a run when the maximum elapsed time is exceeded.
MaxFunctionEvaluations
Terminates a run when the maximum number of function evaluations is exceeded.
MaximumParetoFrontError
Maximum Pareto front error metric.
MetricFileReader
Reader for metric files produced by MetricFileWriter.
MetricFileWriter
Writes metric files.
MetricFileWriter.Metric
Enumeration of metrics that are written to the metric file.
MetricFileWriter.MetricFileWriterSettings
The settings used when writing metric files.
Migration
A migration strategy for an island model.
Min
The node for calculating the minimum value of the two arguments.
MinMaxDominanceComparator
Weighted min-max aggregate function that supports constraints.
MinMaxObjectiveComparator
Weighted min-max aggregate function.
MiscProblemProvider
Problem provider for the miscellaneous test problems.
Modulus
The node for calculating the modulus, or remainder, of two numbers.
MOEAD
Implementation of MOEA/D, the multiobjective evolutionary algorithm with decomposition.
MSOPS
Implementation of the Multiple Single Objective Pareto Sampling (MSOPS) algorithm.
MSOPSRankedPopulation
Population implementing the ranking scheme used by the Multiple Single Objective Pareto Sampling (MSOPS) algorithm.
MultiParentVariation
Abstract class for operators that can take a variable number of parents and produce a variable number of offspring.
Multiply
The node for multiplying two numbers.
Murata
The Murata problem.
Mutation
Identifies mutation operators that evolve exactly one parent.
NativeHypervolume
Calculates hypervolume using a compiled executable.
Negater
Command line utility for negating objective values in result files.
Niche
Niche attribute.
NicheDistance
Related to the Niche attribute, this attribute records the distance from the solution to the niche.
Node
A node in an expression tree.
NondominatedPopulation
A population that maintains the property of pair-wise non-dominance between all solutions.
NondominatedPopulation.DuplicateMode
Specifies how duplicate solutions are handled.
NondominatedSorting
Non-dominated sorting algorithm for dominance depth ranking.
NondominatedSortingComparator
Compares two solutions using their rank and crowding distance.
NondominatedSortingPopulation
Population that maintains the rank and crowdingDistance attributes for its solutions by invoking NondominatedSorting.evaluate(Population).
NOP
The node for defining an empty expression.
NormalBoundaryDivisions
Stores the number of reference point divisions and calculations based on those values.
NormalBoundaryIntersectionGenerator
Generates weights using the Normal Boundary Intersection (NBI) method.
NormalizedIndicator
Abstract class for indicators that require normalized approximation and reference sets.
NormalizedObjectives
The normalized objective values.
Normalizer
Normalizes populations so that all objectives reside in the range [0, 1].
Not
The node for calculating the logical NOT of a boolean value.
NoValidNodeException
Exception indicating no valid tree node was found, so no valid tree could be generated.
NSGAII
Implementation of NSGA-II, with the ability to attach an optional ε-dominance archive.
NSGAIII
Implementation of NSGA-III.
NumberArithmetic
Provides many arithmetic and trigonometric functions that operate on Numbers, performing any necessary implicit casting.
NumberFormatter
Formatter for displaying numeric data.
NumberValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<T>>
Abstract validator for Numbers.
Obayashi
The Obayashi problem.
ObjectiveComparator
Compares two solutions using the value of a specific objective.
ObjectValidator<T>
Validator for generic objects, including arrays.
Observation
An observation records information about an algorithm at a point in time.
Observation
Stores an observed value and the group from which the observation belongs.
Observations
The observations collected over the course of a single algorithm run.
OKA1
Tatsuya Okabe's OKA1 test problem.
OKA2
Tatsuya Okabe's OKA2 test problem.
OMOPSO
Implementation of OMOPSO, a multi-objective particle swarm optimizer (MOPSO).
OnePointCrossover
One-point or single-point crossover.
OneWayANOVA
The Single-Factor Between-Subjects Analysis of Variance determines if (at least) two out of K >= 2 populations have differing means.
OperatorFactory
Factory for creating and variation (e.g., crossover and mutation) operator instances.
OperatorIndex
Operator index attribute.
OperatorProvider
Defines an SPI for initializing different operators.
OptionCompleter
Utility for auto-completion, finding the closest matching unique option from a set of options.
Or
The node for calculating the logical OR of two boolean values.
OrdinalStatisticalTest
Abstract class for implementing ordinal (rank-based) statistical tests.
Osyczka
The Osyczka problem.
Osyczka2
The Osyczka (2) problem.
OutputHandler
Java Logging Handler with some more sensible defaults (in my opinion), including (1) sending logs to System.out instead of System.err, and (2) using a shorter, single line format.
OutputWriter
Writes output files.
OutputWriter.OutputWriterSettings
Common settings when creating an output writer.
PAES
Implementation of the (1+1) Pareto Archived Evolution Strategy (PAES).
PaintHelper
Helper class for maintaining a mapping from series in a plot to their assigned paint.
Parameter
Defines a parameter.
ParameterFile
Loads the parameters in a parameter file.
ParetoConstraintComparator
Compares solutions based on the Pareto efficiency of their constraints.
ParetoDominanceComparator
Compares two solutions using aggregate constraint violation and the Pareto dominance relation as originally proposed by Kalyanmoy Deb.
ParetoFrontGeometry
Functions specifying the Pareto Front geometry for the LSMOP test problem suite.
ParetoObjectiveComparator
Compares two solutions using the Pareto dominance relation on the objectives.
Parser
Parses simple context-free grammars in Backus-Naur form (BNF).
PCX
Parent-centric crossover (PCX) operator.
Penalty
Penalty attribute.
PenaltyFunction
Interface for penalty functions.
PeriodicAction
Deprecated.
Use PeriodicExtension instead
PeriodicAction.FrequencyType
Defines the type of frequency.
PeriodicExtension
An extension that performs an action at a fixed frequency, specified by its FrequencyType.
Permutation
Decision variable for permutations.
PESA2
Implementation of the Pareto Envelope-based Selection Algorithm (PESA2).
PISAHypervolume
Hypervolume indicator as implemented by the PISA library.
Plot
Provides simple 2D plotting capabilities.
Plot.FileType
List of supported file types when saving a plot.
PM
Polynomial mutation (PM) operator.
PMX
Partially mapped crossover (PMX) operator.
PointMutation
Mutates a program by randomly selecting nodes in the expression tree and replacing the node with a new, compatible, randomly-selected node.
Poloni
The Poloni problem.
Population
A collection of solutions and common methods for manipulating the collection.
PopulationCollector
Collects the population from an EvolutionaryAlgorithm.
PopulationSizeCollector
Collects the population size and archive size, if available, from an EvolutionaryAlgorithm.
Power
The node for calculating the power of a base number and exponent.
Prefix
Annotation identifying the prefix used on all properties contained within the annotated class.
PRNG
Static methods for generating random or pseudo-random numbers.
Problem
Interface for defining optimization problems.
ProblemException
An exception that originated from a problem.
ProblemFactory
Factory for creating optimization problem instances and their corresponding reference sets, if known.
ProblemProvider
Defines an SPI for creating named optimization problems.
ProblemStub
A problem stub with a defined number of objectives, but no decision variables or constraints.
ProblemValidator
Validator for Problems.
ProblemWrapper
Wraps a problem instance to modify or extend its functionality.
Production
A context-free grammar production.
Program
A decision variable for programs.
ProgressEvent
A progress report, including the percent complete, elapsed time, and remaining time.
ProgressHelper
Helper for notifying any ProgressListener when the evaluation progress of an Executor changes.
ProgressListener
Interface used to listen for progress reports provided by ProgressHelper.
PropertiesProblems
Legacy problem provider that loads problems defined in "moeaframework.properties".
Property
Annotation added to setter methods that identify auto-configurable properties.
PropertyNotFoundException
Thrown when attempting to read a property and no default value was given.
PropertyScope
Creates a scope for a TypedProperties, allowing the properties to be temporarily overridden within the scope.
ProviderLookupException
Exception indicating an error occurred while locating a provider.
ProviderNotFoundException
Exception indicating a provider was not found.
PSOCollector
Collects the population from an AbstractPSOAlgorithm.
Quagliarella
The Quagliarella problem.
R1Indicator
Computes the R1 indicator.
R2Indicator
Computes the R2 indicator.
R3Indicator
Computes the R3 indicator.
RandomGenerator
Generates weights randomly.
RandomInitialization
Initializes all built-in decision variables randomly.
RandomSearch
Random search implementation.
Rank
The rank of the solution.
RankComparator
Compares solutions using their rank.
RankedObservation
An observation with a rank.
Rastrigin
The Rastrigin function.
Rastrigin
The single-objective Rastrigin problem with an optimum at x = (0, ..., 0) with f(x) = 0.
RealVariable
Decision variable for real values.
RedirectStream
Redirects all content received by an InputStream to an OutputStream.
ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation
Implementation of the reference-point-based nondominated sorting method for NSGA-III.
ReferenceSetMerger
Utility for merging two or more populations identified by unique sources and determining the contribution of each source to the combined non-dominated population.
ReferenceVectorGuidedPopulation
A reference vector guided population, for use with RVEA, that truncates the population using the method outlined in [1].
RegisteredAlgorithmProvider
Algorithm provider that lets callers register algorithms by name.
RegisteredOperatorProvider
Operator provider that lets callers register operators by name.
RegisteredProblemProvider
Problem provider that lets callers register problems by name.
Remove
Remove mutation operator.
Rendon
The Rendon problem.
Rendon2
The Rendon (2) problem.
RepeatedSingleObjective
Instantiates and runs several instances of a single objective algorithm.
Replace
Replacement mutation operator.
ResourceNotFoundException
Similar to a FileNotFoundException, indicates that the resource was not found.
Resources
Utilities for working with resources, which are files that are embedded within Java JAR files and discoverable on the classpath.
Resources.ResourceOption
Options used when locating and extracting resources.
RestartEvent
An event emitted by AdaptiveTimeContinuation indicating a time continuation (restart) event has occurred.
RestartListener
The listener interface for receiving time continuation (restart) events.
RestartType
Enumeration of different restart types during adaptive time continuation.
ResultEntry
An entry in a result file.
ResultFileEvaluator
Command line utility for evaluating the approximation sets stored in a result file and computing its metric file.
ResultFileInfo
Command line utility for counting the number of entries in a result file.
ResultFileMerger
Command line utility for merging the approximation sets stored in one or more result files.
ResultFileReader
Reads result files created by ResultFileWriter.
ResultFileSeedMerger
Command line utility for merging the approximation sets in one or more result files across the seeds.
ResultFileWriter
Writes result files.
ResultFileWriter.ResultFileWriterSettings
The settings used when writing result files.
ResultKey
The key for a result entry, allowing distinct algorithm and problem pairings in sets and maps.
ResultPlot
Abstract Swing component for displaying results.
RIndicator
Abstract class for implementing R indicator functions.
RIndicator.ChebyshevUtility
Chebyshev (also referred to as Chebychev or Tchebycheff) utility function.
RIndicator.LinearWeightedSumUtility
Linear-weighted sum utility function.
RIndicator.UtilityFunction
Interface for defining utility functions.
RingTopology
A ring topology where each island is only connected to one (unidirectional) or two adjacent islands (bidirectional), thus forming the shape of a ring.
Rosenbrock
The Rosenbrock function.
Rosenbrock
The single-objective Rosenbrock problem with an optimum at x = (1, 1) with f(x) = 0.
RotatedProblem
Decorator to create rotated variants of test problems.
RotatedProblems
Problem provider for rotated problems.
RotationMatrixBuilder
Builds rotation matrices of any dimension constructively from one or more 2D planar rotations.
Round
The node for rounding a number to the nearest integer.
Rule
A context-free grammar rule.
Rules
The rules defining the program syntax.
RuntimeCollectorExtension
Extends an algorithm to record the approximation sets at periodic intervals.
RuntimeEvaluator
Command line utility for evaluating an algorithm using many parameterizations.
RVEA
Implementation of the Reference Vector Guided Evolutionary Algorithm (RVEA).
Saltelli
Extension of Sobol's sequence for generating the samples for Saltelli's version of Sobol' global variance decomposition.
SampleGenerator
Command line utility for producing randomly-generated parameters for use by the Evaluator or RuntimeEvaluator.
SampleReader
Reads the parameter samples from the output of SampleGenerator.
SBX
Simulated binary crossover (SBX) operator.
ScaledProblem
Decorator to create scaled variants of problems.
Schaffer
The Schaffer problem.
Schaffer2
The Schaffer (2) problem.
Schaffers
The Schaffers F7 function.
Schwefel
The Schwefel function.
Schwefel
The single-objective Schwefel problem with an optimum at x = (420.9687, ..., 420.9687) with f(x) = 0.
ScriptedProblem
Permits interfacing with problems implemented by one of the many scripting languages supported by the Java Scripting APIs.
Selection
Interface for selection operators.
SelfAdaptiveNormalVariation
Self adaptive variation based on the normal distribution.
Sequence
Interface for generating a sequence of real numbers.
Sequence
The node for executing two or more expressions in sequence.
Set
The node for assigning the value of a named variable within the current scope.
SetContribution
Command line utility for reporting the number of solutions in a set that are contained within a reference set.
SetGenerator
Command line utility for generating reference sets for a given problem.
SetHypervolume
Command line utility for calculating the hypervolume of approximation sets.
Settings
Global settings used by this framework.
ShapeFunction
Shape functions used by the LSMOP test problem suite.
SharpRidge
The Sharp Ridge function.
Sign
The node for calculating the sign of a number.
SimpleStatistics
Command line utility for computing statistics across multiple data files.
SimulatedAnnealing
Implementation of single-objective simulated annealing.
Sin
The node for calculating the trigonometric sine of an angle specified in radians.
SingleLinkageClustering
Single-linkage clustering, which is a hierarchical clustering method that at each step joins the clusters with the closest pair of elements.
SingleNeighborMigration
Migration strategy that sends migrants to exactly one neighboring island each iteration.
SingleObjectiveEvolutionaryAlgorithm
Abstract class for building single-objective evolutionary algorithms.
SingleObjectiveProblemProvider
Problem provider for the single objective test problems.
SingleSampleTTest
The Single-Sample t test determines if the population's mean equals some specified value.
Sinh
The node for calculating the hyperbolic sine of a number.
SMPSO
Implementation of SMPSO, the speed-constrained multi-objective particle swarm optimizer.
SMSEMOA
Implementation of the S-metric Selection MOEA (SMS-MOEA).
Sobol
Generates sequences using the Sobol' low-discrepancy sequence generator.
SobolAnalysis
Global sensitivity analysis of blackbox model output using Saltelli's improved Sobol' global variance decomposition procedure.
Solution
A solution to an optimization problem, storing the decision variables, objectives, constraints and attributes.
Solve
Command line utility for solving an optimization problem using any of the supported optimization algorithms.
SortedListModel<T extends Comparable<T>>
A sorted ListModel which stores only unique entries.
Spacing
Spacing metric.
SPEA2
Implementation of the strength-based evolutionary algorithm (SPEA2).
SPEA2.MutableDistanceMap
Mapping of pair-wise distances between points.
Sphere
The sphere function.
Sphere
The single-objective Sphere problem with an optimum at x = (0, ..., 0) with f(x) = 0.
SPX
Simplex crossover (SPX) operator.
Square
The node for calculating the square of a number.
SquareRoot
The node for calculating the square root of a number.
Srinivas
The Srinivas problem.
SSX
Subset crossover.
StackedProblem
Combines two or more single-objective BBOBFunctions into a multiobjective problem.
StandardIndicator
Enumeration of standard indicators provided by the MOEA Framework.
Stateful
Interface for objects that can save and load their state.
StatisticalResultsViewer
Window for displaying statistical results.
StatisticalTest
Interface for statistical hypothesis testing methods.
Subset
Decision variable for subsets.
Subtract
The node for subtracting two numbers.
SubtreeCrossover
Exchanges a randomly-selected subtree from one program with a compatible, randomly-selected subtree from another program.
SumOfConstraintsPenaltyFunction
Penalty function based on a fixed offset plus the sum of constraint violations.
Swap
Swap mutation operator.
Symbol
A context-free grammar symbol.
TableFormat
Enumeration of supported table output formats.
TabularData<T>
Formats and displays tabular data.
Tamaki
The Tamaki problem.
Tan
The node for calculating the trigonometric tangent of an angle specified in radians.
Tanaka
The Tanaka problem.
Tanh
The node for calculating the hyperbolic tangent of a number.
TargetObjectiveTermination
Terminates a run when at least one solution in the result is equal to or within some allowed difference (epsilon) from a target solution.
TemperatureBasedTerminationCondition
Terminates a simulated annealing algorithm when the temperature drops below a stopping, or minimum, temperature.
TerminationCondition
Interface used to implement conditions for when an algorithm should terminate.
ThreadedIslandExecutor
Executes an island model locally using multiple threads.
ThreadLocalMersenneTwister
A thread-safe version of the MersenneTwister random number generator (RNG).
Timer
Utility for measuring elapsed time.
Timing
Global timer for quickly measuring and displaying timing data.
TimingProblem
Wraps a problem to collect objective function evaluation timing data.
Topology
Defines the topology for an island model.
TournamentSelection
Deterministic tournament selection operator.
TransformObjectiveOscillate
Transformation that oscillates the objective values of the inner function.
TransformObjectivePenalize
Transformation that penalizes the objectives if the decision variables fall outside the region of interest.
TransformObjectivePower
Transformation that raises the objective value to the power of a given exponent.
TransformObjectiveShift
Transformation that offsets the value of the objective by a fixed amount.
TransformVariablesAffine
Performs an affine transformation of the form f(x) = Mx + b.
TransformVariablesAsymmetric
Transformation used to convert a symmetric to an asymmetric decision space.
TransformVariablesBrs
Transformation that skews or scales the decision variables using the same method described by the Buche-Rastrigin function.
TransformVariablesConditioning
Transformation that alters the condition number of the function.
TransformVariablesOscillate
Transformation that applies a monotone oscillation to the decision variables of the inner function.
TransformVariablesScale
Transformation that scales the decision variables by a given factor.
TransformVariablesShift
Transformation that shifts all decision variables by a given offset.
TransformVariablesXHat
The x-hat transformation, which negates some of the decision variables.
TransformVariablesZHat
The z-hat transformation used by the Schwefel function.
Truncate
The node for truncating, or bounding, a number within a range.
TwoPointCrossover
Two-point crossover.
TwoSampleTTest
The Two-Sample t test determines if the mean of two populations are different.
TypedProperties
Stores a collection of key-value pairs similar to Properties but has support for reading and writing primitive types.
TypeSafeCrossover<T extends Variable>
An abstract variation class that validates the types of each variable before applying the crossover operation with a given probability.
TypeSafeMutation<T extends Variable>
An abstract mutation class that validates the types of each variable before applying the mutation operation with a given probability.
UF1
The unconstrained UF1 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF10
The unconstrained UF10 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF11
The unconstrained UF11 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF12
The unconstrained UF12 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF13
The unconstrained UF13 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF2
The unconstrained UF2 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF3
The unconstrained UF3 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF4
The unconstrained UF4 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF5
The unconstrained UF5 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF6
The unconstrained UF6 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF7
The unconstrained UF7 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF8
The unconstrained UF8 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UF9
The unconstrained UF9 test problem from the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
UM
Uniform mutation (UM) operator.
UNDX
Unimodal Normal Distribution Crossover (UNDX) operator.
Uniform
Generates sequences using a uniform random distribution.
UniformCrossover
Crossover operator where each index is randomly swapped between the parents with a 50% chance.
UniformDesignGenerator
Generates weights according to a uniform design of mixtures using the Hammersley low-discrepancy sequence generator.
UniformSelection
Uniform selection operator.
UnsatisfiedArgumentException
Exception indicating a tree node had one or more unsatisfied arguments so no valid tree could be constructed.
UNSGAIII
Implementation of the "unified" NSGA-III, or U-NSGA-III, which improves selection pressure by replacing the random selection of NSGA-III with tournament selection.
UpdateCodeSamples
Utility to update code samples and output found in various documents, including Markdown and HTML / XSLT files.
Validate
Static methods for creating validators of parameters, arguments, or inputs.
Validator<T>
Abstract class for validators.
Variable
Interface for decision variables.
VariableFormatter
Formatter for Variables.
Variation
Interface for variation operators.
Vector
Mathematical operators for manipulating vectors (double arrays).
VectorAngleDistanceScalingComparator
The vector angle distance scaling aggregate function.
VEGA
Implementation of the Vector Evaluated Genetic Algorithm (VEGA).
Viennet
The Viennet problem.
Viennet2
The Viennet (2) problem.
Viennet3
The Viennet (3) problem.
Viennet4
The Viennet (4) problem.
WeightGenerator
Interface for generating a sequence of weights.
WFG
Implements methods shared by all problems in the WFG test suite.
WFG1
The WFG1 test problem.
WFG2
The WFG2 test problem.
WFG3
The WFG3 test problem.
WFG4
The WFG4 test problem.
WFG5
The WFG5 test problem.
WFG6
The WFG6 test problem.
WFG7
The WFG7 test problem.
WFG8
The WFG8 test problem.
WFG9
The WFG9 test problem.
WFGHypervolume
Fast hypervolume calculation published by the Walking Fish Group (WFG).
WFGNormalizedHypervolume
Fast hypervolume calculation published by the Walking Fish Group (WFG).
WFGProblemProvider
Problem provider for the WFG test problems.
While
The node for repeatedly executing an expression while a condition, a boolean expression, remains true.
WilcoxonSignedRanksTest
The Wilcoxon Signed-Ranks test determines if the population median is equal to a specified value.
Zakharov
The single-objective Zakharov problem with an optimum at x = (0, ..., 0) with f(x) = 0.
ZCAT
Abstract class for implementing ZCAT test problems.
ZCAT1
The ZCAT1 test problem.
ZCAT10
The ZCAT10 test problem.
ZCAT11
The ZCAT11 test problem.
ZCAT12
The ZCAT12 test problem.
ZCAT13
The ZCAT13 test problem.
ZCAT14
The ZCAT14 test problem.
ZCAT15
The ZCAT15 test problem.
ZCAT16
The ZCAT16 test problem.
ZCAT17
The ZCAT17 test problem.
ZCAT18
The ZCAT18 test problem.
ZCAT19
The ZCAT19 test problem.
ZCAT2
The ZCAT2 test problem.
ZCAT20
The ZCAT20 test problem.
ZCAT3
The ZCAT3 test problem.
ZCAT4
The ZCAT4 test problem.
ZCAT5
The ZCAT5 test problem.
ZCAT6
The ZCAT6 test problem.
ZCAT7
The ZCAT7 test problem.
ZCAT8
The ZCAT8 test problem.
ZCAT9
The ZCAT9 test problem.
ZCATProblemProvider
Problem provider for the ZCAT test problems.
ZDT
Implements methods shared by all problems in the ZDT test suite.
ZDT1
The ZDT1 test problem.
ZDT2
The ZDT2 test problem.
ZDT3
The ZDT3 test problem.
ZDT4
The ZDT4 test problem.
ZDT5
The ZDT5 test problem.
ZDT6
The ZDT6 test problem.
ZDTProblemProvider
Problem provider for the ZDT test problems.
